name: Caramel Dipped Chocolate Covered Pretzel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the caramels and water in a saucepan. Melt over low heat, stirring frequently, or place in a covered dish and microwave at full power for 1.5 minutes.
2. Dip the pretzel nuggets one at a time into the caramel and remove onto the greased cookie sheet.
3. Refrigerate until the caramel is firm.
4. Melt 3 ounces of chocolate. Remove from heat.
5. Add the remaining 1 ounce of chocolate in two additions, stirring until each addition is completely melted before adding the next.
6. Lift the caramels from the sheet and dip one at a time into the chocolate, coating completely. Lift with a small fork.
7. Shake off excess chocolate by lightly tapping the fork on the edge of the bowl. Remove any drips by running the fork across the edge of the bowl.
8. Slide the candy onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper or wax paper. Allow to cool until solid. Let set at room temperature or in the refrigerator. Makes 3 dozen chocolates, about 18 servings.
